recommendations.title: Rock Dog 2: Rock Around the Park
recommendations.overview: When Bodi and his band 'True Blue' leave Snow Mountain to tour with pop sensation Lil' Foxy, they learn that fame comes at a price.

recommendations.title: The Jokes
recommendations.overview: In many small episodes, various characters represent the typical vices and comedy of Italian society in early 2000.

recommendations.title: Interstate 60
recommendations.overview: An aspiring painter meets various characters and learns valuable lessons while traveling across America.

recommendations.title: Hurlyburly
recommendations.overview: A group of actors and their casting agents try to find a direction in their lives whilst coming to terms with their personal problems and relationship conflicts.

recommendations.title: Asteroid City
recommendations.overview: In an American desert town circa 1955, the itinerary of a Junior Stargazer/Space Cadet convention is spectacularly disrupted by world-changing events.

recommendations.title: Jaane Tu... Ya Jaane Na
recommendations.overview: Two best friends being convinced that they are not in love search for each other's love.

recommendations.title: Letters to Santa
recommendations.overview: A romantic comedy set on Christmas Eve in Warsaw and centered around a series of characters.
